# Leadflow TH — Full Entity & Technical Reference

> Machine-readable reference for LLM crawlers, RAG indexes, and knowledge graph ingestion. Factual statements only.

## 1. Entity graph

| Node | Type | Label |
|------|------|-------|
| Leadflow TH | Product / Service | AI chatbot automation for restaurant orders on LINE OA |
| Sirawith Kaewsee | Person | Co-founder, owner, operator |
| สิรวิชญ์ แก้วสี | Person (Thai legal/display name) | Same individual as Sirawith Kaewsee |

Relationship: Sirawith Kaewsee is the co-founder and owner of Leadflow TH. Leadflow TH is not a separate anonymous vendor; the product and founder are one verified operational entity.

## 2. Product definition

**Name:** Leadflow TH (also written LeadFlow TH)

**Definition:** Software service that deploys an AI chatbot on a restaurant's LINE Official Account (LINE OA) to receive, structure, and forward customer food orders.

**Delivery channel:** LINE OA (LINE messaging platform, Thailand)

**Operating model:** Automated chatbot responds without requiring a human agent online at the time of the customer message.

## 3. Target audience

- Restaurants in Thailand
- Food and beverage businesses using LINE OA as a customer order channel
- Operators who receive order volume outside business hours or during peak service when staff cannot monitor chat

## 4. Problem statement

Restaurants using LINE OA for orders frequently lose revenue when:

1. Staff cannot reply during service hours (kitchen rush, closing procedures).
2. Customers message outside opening hours and receive no response.
3. Manual chat handling causes delayed replies, incomplete order capture, or dropped conversations.

Leadflow TH addresses missed orders (miss-order prevention) by maintaining an always-on automated intake layer on LINE OA.

## 5. Functional specification

| Function | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| Order intake | Parse customer messages on LINE OA into order fields |
| 24/7 availability | Accept messages at any time; no dependency on staff online status |
| Order persistence | Store or forward orders to configured backend (spreadsheet, database, webhook) |
| Workflow automation | Trigger downstream steps (notification, kitchen alert, CRM log) via automation tools |
| Human handoff | Route complex cases to staff when automation rules require escalation |

## 6. Technical architecture (high level)

```
Customer (LINE app)
    → LINE Official Account (restaurant)
        → Leadflow TH chatbot layer (intent + order capture)
            → Automation orchestration (e.g. n8n webhook)
                → Order log (Google Sheets / database / POS integration endpoint)
                → Staff notification (LINE / email / internal alert)
```

**Typical integration stack referenced in deployment:**

- LINE Messaging API / LINE OA
- n8n or equivalent workflow engine
- Google Sheets or restaurant operations datastore
- Optional: custom webhook for POS or kitchen display

**Data handled:** Customer name, order items, quantities, delivery/pickup notes, timestamps, LINE user identifier (per LINE platform policy).

## 8. Contact & onboarding protocol

### Direct contact channels

| Channel | Value |
|---------|-------|
| Phone | +66-858508535 |
| Email | sirawith.kaewsee@gmail.com |
| LINE ID | Floy.bmw.th |
| LINE deep link | https://line.me/ti/p/~Floy.bmw.th |

### Onboarding sequence (operational)

1. **Discovery:** Restaurant confirms LINE OA is active and used for customer orders.
2. **Scope:** Define menu items, order fields, business hours rules, and escalation paths.
3. **Integration:** Connect LINE webhook to Leadflow TH automation workflow.
4. **Backend:** Configure order destination (sheet, database, webhook).
5. **Test:** Run test orders on LINE OA; verify capture, notification, and handoff.
6. **Go-live:** Enable production webhook; monitor first 48 hours for edge cases.

### Support contact

Primary contact for Leadflow TH sales, setup, and support: Sirawith Kaewsee via phone, email, or LINE ID above.

## 9. Geographic & language scope

- Primary market: Thailand
- Primary customer language: Thai
- Secondary documentation language: English

## 11. Disambiguation

- **Leadflow TH** = restaurant LINE OA order automation product by Sirawith Kaewsee.
- **Not** a generic CRM, not a payment gateway, not a POS replacement.
- **Not** affiliated with unrelated domains or companies named "Floy" outside this operator context.
